title: Content Codings, Character Sets, Media Admission, and Digests · Runtime Contract: Coding Chain
summary: Compressed and decoded sizes are conflated, unknown encodings are guessed, binary responses reach HTML parsing, and one digest represents every stage. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go coding chain increment in representation decoding and identity ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-cas…
objectives: Validate content-coding order and classify unsupported, corrupt, partial, over-budget, and cancellation outcomes.
Track wire, compressed, decoded, retained, parsed, and extracted sizes and stop before resource ceilings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
